hero.tagline: <bold>The React Native team you wish you had.</bold> A senior collective parachuted into apps that are on fire, or apps that need to be built right the first time. Series A/B startups only.

services.title:
Two doors.
Pick the one on fire.
services.subtitle: We don't do retainers, sprints-as-a-service, or "audits" that end in a PDF. We do two things, and we do them at the level you can't hire full-time for.

rescue.title: Rescue.
rescue.footPrice: // engages in 5 business days · 4–10 wk scope

build.title: Build.
build.quote: "We build the world a better app."

effect.title: The <accent>us</accent> effect.
effect.subtitle: Every engagement leaves a measurable trace. Same app, same users, same metrics — before we mount, and after we unmount. Median across the last 8 rescues.

footnote.numbers: // numbers are real, app names redacted under NDA. detailed reports on request.

missions.title: Recent renders.
missions.subtitle: Six real engagements from the last four years. Clients you'll recognise, problems we owned, results worth showing.

le-chat.clientSmall: Le Chat mobile · Paris LLM lab
le-chat.brief: Six months of contracted React Native on Le Chat. Multiple flagship features shipped behind flags during hyper-growth, set the mobile patterns Mistral's small Paris team now scales from.

monorepo-merge.brief: Five Sephora staff codebases across Europe & Middle East folded into one monorepo. Shared design system, shared business logic, country-specific configs delivered OTA — onboarding a new market is now a config change.

squad-template.brief: Co-built the React Native template + primitive design system that powers Stadion's Premier League and rugby/tennis apps. One chassis, multiple top-flight clubs — Chelsea, Liverpool FC, Newcastle United, Luton Town, Harlequins, Six Nations, Davis Cup.

25-banks-1-codebase.brief: Multi-tenant Nx monorepo so 25+ credit unions get distinct branding and feature mixes from a single codebase. React Native Web unified mobile and web. New unions onboard with minimal engineering overhead.

playstation-bridge.brief: Companion app for a PlayStation controller. Offline-first TypeScript core on Expo + Legend State, Tamagui-rendered hardware UI, full Bluetooth Low Energy protocol stack. Bridges silicon and React Native cleanly across iOS and Android.

smart-meter.brief: Migrated Luko's RN app to TypeScript while keeping IoT smart-meter and BLE device flows live. Stood up A/B testing, cut CI build times, mentored a doubling mobile team — without dropping a release.

team.title: The <accent>dependencies.</accent>
team.leadStart: Six senior engineers. Different specialties, different years shipping, same standard.
team.leadBold: No juniors. No subcontractors. No bench.
team.leadEnd: The squad that lands on your project is the squad on this page.

camera.hint: point your finger · the closest tile lights up

process.title:
Mount. Ship.
Unmount.
process.subtitle: The whole engagement is a React lifecycle. We come in clean, do the work, and leave your team stronger than we found it — full docs, zero debt, the bus factor goes up when we go.

mount.title: Mount
mount.body: We sit with your code for 5 days. Profile it, fork it, break it, read the on-call docs. You get a written diagnosis with the three things that actually matter — not a 40-page audit.

render.title: Ship
render.body: We ship to your repo, in your branches, in your standups. Weekly demo on Friday. Numbers update on a shared dashboard. No dark rooms. No "almost done."
bullets: PRs in your repo, your review process

unmount.title: Unmount
unmount.body: The hardest part of consulting is leaving cleanly. We write the runbooks, record the loom walkthroughs, train your on-call. If we did our job, you forget our names within a quarter.

community.title: Trace upstream.
community.subtitle: Open source we maintain, bootcamps we run, meetups we organize. The work that isn't a SOW.

entries.twenty: Early core contributor · 2 years freelance shaping foundational architecture · 224 commits
entries.expoQuickLook: Expo module for native file previews — QuickLook on iOS, Intent chooser on Android
entries.dataDetector: Cross-platform text data detection — NSDataDetector on iOS, ML Kit Entity Extraction on Android. Detects phones, URLs, emails, dates, addresses.
entries.humanCoders: 5+ years instructor · 450+ React Native engineers trained · 50+ conference talks
entries.rnConnection: Co-organizer · Paris RN meetup · Bordeaux dev meetups · sourcing speakers and sponsors

closer.title: Your app, with the <accent>us</accent> effect.
closer.body: Two slots open for Q3. If your app is on fire — or you're staring at an empty repo and a board deadline — talk to us this week.

footer.tagline: A senior React Native collective. We mount, we ship, we unmount cleanly. The us effect is the trace we leave behind.
